member.name: T:SimpleAuth.InMemoryClientStore
member.summary: In-memory implementation for development and tests.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.InMemoryClientStore.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{SimpleAuth.Client})
member.summary: Creates a store seeded with the provided clients.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.InMemoryClientStore.Upsert(SimpleAuth.Client)
member.summary: Adds or replaces a client.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.InMemoryResourceStore
member.summary: In-memory implementation for development and tests.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.InMemoryResourceStore.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{SimpleAuth.Scope},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{SimpleAuth.IdentityScope},System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{SimpleAuth.ProtectedResource})
member.summary: Creates a store seeded with the provided values.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.InMemoryResourceStore.UpsertScope(SimpleAuth.Scope)
member.summary: Adds or replaces a scope.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.InMemoryResourceStore.UpsertIdentityScope(SimpleAuth.IdentityScope)
member.summary: Adds or replaces an identity scope.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.InMemoryResourceStore.UpsertResource(SimpleAuth.ProtectedResource)
member.summary: Adds or replaces a protected resource.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.InMemoryAuthorizationCodeStore
member.summary: In-memory implementation.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.InMemoryAuthorizationCodeStore.#ctor
member.summary: Creates an empty authorization code store.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.InMemoryAuthorizationCodeStore.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{SimpleAuth.AuthorizationCode})
member.summary: Seeds the store with existing authorization codes.

member.name: T:SimpleAuth.InMemoryRefreshTokenStore
member.summary: In-memory implementation.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.InMemoryRefreshTokenStore.#ctor
member.summary: Creates an empty refresh token store.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.InMemoryRefreshTokenStore.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{SimpleAuth.RefreshToken})
member.summary: Seeds the store with existing refresh tokens.

member.summary: In-memory implementation.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.InMemoryTokenStore.#ctor
member.summary: Creates an empty token store.

member.name: M:SimpleAuth.InMemoryTokenStore.#ctor(System.Collections.Generic.IEnumerable{SimpleAuth.IssuedToken})
member.summary: Seeds the store with existing issued tokens.

member.summary: In-memory implementation.

member.summary: Creates an empty signing key store.

member.summary: Seeds the store with existing signing keys.

member.summary: Creates an empty JTI store.
